scripts.dev: WRITE_ENV_ONLY=1 node scripts/preview-random.mjs && PORT=$(grep -E '^PORT=' .env | cut -d= -f2) APP_BASE_PATH=$(grep -E '^APP_BASE_PATH=' .env | cut -d= -f2) NUXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NUXT_HOST=localhost NUXT_PORT=$PORT NITRO_PORT=$PORT NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=3072 ./node_modules/.bin/nuxt dev --host localhost --port $PORT
scripts.dev:silent: WRITE_ENV_ONLY=1 node scripts/preview-random.mjs >/dev/null 2>&1 && PORT=$(grep -E '^PORT=' .env | cut -d= -f2) APP_BASE_PATH=$(grep -E '^APP_BASE_PATH=' .env | cut -d= -f2) NUXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NUXT_HOST=localhost NUXT_PORT=$PORT NITRO_PORT=$PORT NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=3072 ./node_modules/.bin/nuxt dev --host localhost --port $PORT
scripts.dev:clean: rm -rf .nuxt node_modules/.cache && WRITE_ENV_ONLY=1 node scripts/preview-random.mjs && PORT=$(grep -E '^PORT=' .env | cut -d= -f2) APP_BASE_PATH=$(grep -E '^APP_BASE_PATH=' .env | cut -d= -f2) NUXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NUXT_HOST=localhost NUXT_PORT=$PORT NITRO_PORT=$PORT NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=3072 ./node_modules/.bin/nuxt dev --host localhost --port $PORT
